summary: Prepend www. when the cookie domain begins with . (parent-domain notation) before passing the URL to pycookiecheat.
reason: pycookiecheat's chrome_cookies('https://myfitnesspal.com') returns a different (smaller) cookie set than chrome_cookies('https://www.myfitnesspal.com') — the bare-domain form misses parent-domain cookies, which include the __Secure-next-auth.session-token MFP needs to recognize the request as logged-in. Auth login was reporting success but storing 12 of the wrong cookies.
